meta.title: Francisco Marinho - Senior Frontend Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Francisco Marinho, Senior Frontend Developer specialized in React, Next.js and TypeScript with 5+ years of experience.

hero.name: Francisco Marinho
hero.tagline: Need a website or application? I'm a front-end professional with extensive experience. I can solve your problem using the best technologies on the market.

about.label: About
about.title: Who I am
about.bio_1: Software Engineer with a Master's Degree in Computer Science from UFAM, with 5+ years of experience in Front-End Development using React.js, Next.js, Angular, JavaScript ES6+, TypeScript, Vite and Webpack. Specialist in modular architectures and creating reusable components.
about.bio_2: I have solid experience in advanced state management via Context API, Zustand, Redux and Redux Saga, integration of REST APIs and GraphQL, performance optimization (Lighthouse > 95), automated testing with Jest and Cypress, and collaborative workflows with Git Flow and CI/CD.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: What I've already built
projects.subtitle: A selection of the projects I'm most proud of.

items.title: UpRobotics
items.description: Web tool for visual programming of robotic arms using Google Blocks. It allows you to generate code for Arduino UNO or 3D simulations in Webots via an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.

items.title: SaaS Platform for Screenwriters
items.description: SaaS platform for screenwriters developed at O2 Filmes with React.js and TypeScript. Scalable components with Redux + Saga, REST/GraphQL integration and automated CI/CD pipelines.

items.title: HostGator Client Dashboard
items.description: Dashboard for HostGator customers with metrics visualization, service management and integrated support. Developed with a focus on user experience, performance and accessibility.

items.title: HostGator shopping cart
items.description: HostGator's shopping cart module for purchasing hosting products and services. Developed with React.js and Redux Saga, with a focus on conversion and a fluid shopping experience.

items.title: MBX Academy System
items.description: Pecege Institute's learning management system (LMS) for corporate education, responsible for making available, transmitting and managing classes, events, assessments and reports.

items.title: Customer Portal - Atem
items.description: Customer portal for Atem Distribuidora de Petróleo with React.js and TypeScript. It offers invoice viewing, order history and integration with AWS services for secure authentication.

items.title: University Laboratory Site
items.description: Institutional website for a university laboratory developed with Bootstrap, HTML5 and CSS3. It presents research, publications and members of the group with responsive design and accessible navigation.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Professional career
experience.subtitle: Companies and projects that have shaped my career.

items.description: I develop and maintain web applications for monetization, innovation and AI agent teams. I create responsive and scalable interfaces, implement new features and contribute to the evolution of front-end architecture.
highlights: Jenkins, Design System, JavaScript ES6+, Redux Saga
Jest and React Testing Library with a focus on Clean Code
Monetization teams, innovation and AI agents

items.description: I worked on a SaaS platform for scriptwriters, developing scalable components with React.js and TypeScript, managing flows with Redux + Saga and integrating REST/GraphQL APIs.
highlights: REST/GraphQL integration and testing with Jest
CI/CD with GitHub Actions and Docker

items.description: I've led products in React.js/React Native and TypeScript, structuring flows with Redux + Saga, component libraries and REST/GraphQL integrations. I've worked in agile squads with a focus on performance and scalability.

items.company: Sidia Institute of Science and Technology
items.description: I created responsive dashboards integrated with real-time telemetry. I structured a shared design system, implemented micro-frontends with Module Federation and maintained CI tests and pipelines.
I created the web tool UpRobotics with Google Blocks to facilitate the programming of robotic arms, with code generation for Arduino UNO and 3D simulations in Webots.
Dissertation focused on educational robotics. Publications in SBIE 2022 and SBESC 2020.
